overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic downtown district at dusk. The player walks along a sidewalk past modern skyscrapers with neon lighting, crosses an intersection, and enters a covered pedestrian walkway with glass storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk approaching intersection with crosswalk

events.description: pedestrian in pink jacket passes by on the right side
futuristic sedan drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the intersection, passing a speed limit 40 sign and palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: futuristic dark building with angular geometric design and yellow accent lighting
multi-story parking structure with exposed levels and diagonal support beams
street sign displaying speed limit 40 mounted on a pole
yellow zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk, with the camera walking toward a large intersection. The angular mega-structure looms ahead on the left while an open parking garage rises on the right. The camera passes a speed limit sign and a pedestrian in a pink jacket, with sparse vehicle traffic moving along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing leading into covered pedestrian arcade

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian walkway under the angular mega-structure
ambient light shifts to darker artificial lighting as moving deeper into the covered area

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and entering the covered walkway entrance, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead into the covered walkway

entered.detail: futuristic display structure with glowing blue holographic elements and rotating rings
large entrance to the covered pedestrian passage with illuminated yellow trim

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the yellow-striped intersection and approaches the entrance to a covered walkway. The sky becomes mostly obscured as the camera enters beneath the angular mega-structure. A holographic advertisement structure with blue glowing elements becomes prominent on the right, while pedestrians gather near the entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping arcade with glass storefronts and neon signage

events.description: passing illuminated glass shop windows displaying merchandise on the left
slight navigation around pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade, passing shop windows and navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket with red hair walking toward the camera

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated interior displays showing various merchandise
bright cyan neon signs with futuristic text and symbols
futuristic red automated kiosks or vending machines

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the covered pedestrian walkway, now fully sheltered from the sky. Glass shop windows with illuminated displays line the left side, while bright cyan neon signage and red vending kiosks occupy the right. The environment is lit entirely by artificial neon and building lights, creating a characteristic cyberpunk atmosphere as the camera continues through the arcade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open city street at dusk into the artificial glow of a sheltered pedestrian arcade. It begins on a futuristic sidewalk, moving toward a large intersection while passing a pedestrian in a pink jacket and an angular mega-structure that looms overhead. As the camera crosses the yellow-striped intersection, the open sky is gradually obscured by the architecture, shifting the focus toward a prominent blue holographic advertisement. The scene then transitions fully beneath the mega-structure and into a covered walkway, where natural light is replaced by the vivid radiance of cyan neon signs and red vending kiosks. Finally, the camera moves deeper into this sheltered environment, gliding past illuminated glass shop windows that line the corridor.
